testcase.name: test_get_enquiries

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False + where False = isinstance({'items': [{'address': None, 'city': 'Nashik', 'courses': [], 'created_at': '2026-04-15T07:46:11.694000', ...}, {'address': None, 'city': 'Mumbai', 'courses': [], 'created_at': '2026-04-15T07:46:11.348000', ...}, {'address': None, 'city': 'Pune', 'courses': [], 'created_at': '2026-04-15T07:46:11.004000', ...}, {'address': None, 'city': 'Nashik', 'courses': [], 'created_at': '2026-04-15T07:46:10.596000', ...}, {'address': None, 'city': 'Mumbai', 'courses': [], 'created_at': '2026-04-15T07:46:10.261000', ...}, {'address': None, 'city': 'Pune', 'courses': [], 'created_at': '2026-04-15T07:46:09.916000', ...}, ...], 'page': 1, 'pages': 6, 'total': 90}, list) + where {'items': [{'address': None, 'city': 'Nashik', 'courses': [], 'created_at': '2026-04-15T07:46:11.694000', ...}, {'address': None, 'city': 'Mumbai', 'courses': [], 'created_at': '2026-04-15T07:46:11.348000', ...}, {'address': None, 'city': 'Pune', 'courses': [], 'created_at': '2026-04-15T07:46:11.004000', ...}, {'address': None, 'city': 'Nashik', 'courses': [], 'created_at': '2026-04-15T07:46:10.596000', ...}, {'address': None, 'city': 'Mumbai', 'courses': [], 'created_at': '2026-04-15T07:46:10.261000', ...}, {'address': None, 'city': 'Pune', 'courses': [], 'created_at': '2026-04-15T07:46:09.916000', ...}, ...], 'page': 1, 'pages': 6, 'total': 90} = json() + where json = <Response [200]>.json

testcase.name: test_dashboard_summary
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_phase2_phase3.py:159: in test_dashboard_summary assert r.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
